name: PEG: THE CURSE! A Femdom RPG
description:
It might’ve been a mistake to make that wish on the creepy old coin-operated machine at the pier. You wished that every hot woman you met would find you irresistibly attractive and do anything to fuck you, and once they did, they would cum so hard they’d be addicted to fucking you. As soon as you spoke your wish aloud, the witch dummy inside the machine said “GRANTED” and you felt a strange surge of energy through your body. Now you’re headed home from the pier and all the beautiful women you see are looking at you strangely. It could be attraction, but there’s something darker in their gazes. Something dangerous. Did you get your wish? Or… are you cursed? Or both?
